session.user:
Perform the following renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py`:
1. In `DispatchResult` dataclass (around line 88): - `plan_title: str` → `pr_title: str` - `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str`
2. In `_build_workflow_run_url()` (around line 100): - Parameter `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str` - All uses of `plan_url` within function → `pr_url`
3. In `_build_pr_url()` (around line 117): - Parameter `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str` - All uses of `plan_url` within function → `pr_url`
4. In `_dispatch_planned_pr_plan()`: - Dispatch dict keys: `"plan_id"` → `"pr_number"`, `"plan_title"` → `"pr_title"` (these are the string literal dict keys in the `inputs` dict, around line 286) - `plan_title=validated.title` → `pr_title=validated.title` - `plan_url=validated.url` → `pr_url=validated.url` - In the DispatchResult construction: `plan_title=validated.title` → `pr_title=validated.title`, `plan_url=validated.url` → `pr_url=validated.url`
5. In `_dispatch_planned_pr_plan_remote()`: - Same dispatch dict key renames: `"plan_id"` → `"pr_number"`, `"plan_title"` → `"pr_title"` (around line 513) - In the DispatchResult construction: `plan_title=validated.title` → `pr_title=validated.title`, `plan_url=validated.url` → `pr_url=validated.url`
6. In `_detect_plan_number_from_context()` (around line 596): - Rename function to `_detect_pr_number_from_context()`
7. In `_print_dispatch_summary()`: - `r.plan_title` → `r.pr_title` - `r.plan_url` → `r.pr_url`
8. In `_dispatch_local()`: - Update call from `_detect_plan_number_from_context` to `_detect_pr_number_from_context`
DO NOT rename: - `plan_backend` dict key (that's a valid concept name) - `PlanNotFound`, `extract_plan_content`, `extract_plan_header_branch_name` imports - `plan_store` or `plan_backend` on ctx
Read the file first, then use Edit tool for targeted replacements.

session.assistant:

session.tool_result:
--- src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py.backup 2026-03-10 13:28:15.406575284 +0000 +++ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py 2026-03-10 13:28:25.683253956 +0000 @@ -89,42 +89,42 @@ """Result of dispatching a single plan."""

-def _build_workflow_run_url(plan_url: str, run_id: str) -> str: +def _build_workflow_run_url(pr_url: str, run_id: str) -> str: """Construct GitHub Actions workflow run URL from plan URL and run ID.
Args: - plan_url: GitHub plan URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123) + pr_url: GitHub plan URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123) run_id: Workflow run ID
Returns: Workflow run URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/actions/runs/1234567890) """ - owner_repo = extract_owner_repo_from_github_url(plan_url) + owner_repo = extract_owner_repo_from_github_url(pr_url)
... [98 lines omitted] ...

session.tool_result:
inputs = { "plan_id": str(pr_number), "submitted_by": submitted_by, "plan_title": validated.title, "branch_name": branch_name, "pr_number": str(pr_number), "base_branch": base_branch, "plan_backend": "planned_pr", **workflow_config, }
-- inputs = { "plan_id": str(pr_number), "submitted_by": submitted_by,
session.assistant: I see! There were both `"plan_id"` and `"pr_number"` keys in the original dict. Since we only renamed `"plan_id"` to `"pr_number"`, we now have a duplicate. Let me check if we should remove one of them:

I see the issue - there's now a duplicate `"pr_number"` key. The original dict had both `"plan_id"` and `"pr_number"` with the same value. Since we renamed `"plan_id"` to `"pr_number"`, we now have the key twice. This was part of a transition period. Let me remove the first occurrence (which was the old "plan_id") since the duplicate will only keep the last value:

session.assistant:
Excellent! All the renaming is complete. Let me create a summary of the changes:
## Summary
Successfully completed all requested renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py`:
### Changes Made:
1. **DispatchResult dataclass (line 88-97)**: - `plan_title: str` → `pr_title: str` - `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str`
2. **_build_workflow_run_url() function (line 100)**: - Parameter: `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str` - All uses within function updated
3. **_build_pr_url() function (line 117)**: - Parameter: `plan_url: str` → `pr_url: str` - All uses within function updated
4. **_dispatch_planned_pr_plan() function (line 191)**: - Dispatch dict keys (line 286-290): - Removed duplicate `"plan_id": str(pr_number)` (was creating duplicate with existing `"pr_number"`) - `"plan_title"` → `"pr_title"` - DispatchResult construction (line 372-375): - `plan_title=validated.title` → `pr_title=validated.title` - `plan_url=validated.url` → `pr_url=validated.url`
5. **_dispatch_planned_pr_plan_remote() function (line 443)**: - Dispatch dict keys (line 512-517): - Removed duplicate `"plan_id": str(pr_number)` - `"plan_title"` → `"pr_title"` - DispatchResult construction (line 585-588): - `plan_title=validated.title` → `pr_title=validated.title` - `plan_url=validated.url` → `pr_url=validated.url`
6. **_detect_plan_number_from_context() (line 594)**: - Function renamed to `_detect_pr_number_from_context()`
7. **_print_dispatch_summary() function (line 829)**: - `r.plan_title` → `r.pr_title` - `r.plan_url` → `r.pr_url`
8. **_dispatch_local() function (line 711)**: - Updated call from `_detect_plan_number_from_context` to `_detect_pr_number_from_context` (line 749)
### Items Preserved (as requested):
- `plan_backend` dict key (valid concept name) - `PlanNotFound`, `extract_plan_content`, `extract_plan_header_branch_name` imports - `plan_store` and `plan_backend` on ctx - `plan_id` parameters in `build_impl_context_files()` calls (part of shared API)
All changes have been validated: - Python syntax check passed - No remaining references to old field names found - All function calls updated appropriately
